description: Template for extracting structured information from scientific papers. Each UO follows a 7-component structure.

fields.catalog_id: Matching workflow ID from workflow_catalog.json (null if new)
fields.name: Workflow name
fields.description: Brief description of what the workflow does
fields.is_new: true if not found in workflow_catalog.json
fields.source_section: Paper section where this was found

fields.catalog_id: Matching UO ID from uo_catalog.json (null if new)
fields.name: Unit operation name
fields.is_new: true if not found in uo_catalog.json
fields.consumables: Consumable items used (tips, plates, tubes, etc.)
fields.discussion: Notes, caveats, or discussions about this UO
fields.source_section: Paper section where this was found

software_uos.description: Software Unit Operations (data processing, analysis). 7-component structure.

fields.catalog_id: Matching UO ID from uo_catalog.json (null if new)
fields.name: Unit operation name
fields.is_new: true if not found in uo_catalog.json
fields.source_section: Paper section where this was found

equipment.description: Equipment and instruments mentioned in the paper

fields.name: Equipment name
fields.source_section: Paper section where this was found

consumables.description: Consumable items (tips, plates, tubes, kits, etc.)

fields.name: Consumable name
fields.type: Category (plate, tip, tube, kit, membrane, etc.)
fields.source_section: Paper section where this was found

fields.name: Reagent name
fields.source_section: Paper section where this was found

fields.name: Sample name or identifier
fields.type: Category (strain, cell line, tissue, plasmid, etc.)
fields.source_section: Paper section where this was found

qc_checkpoints.description: Quality control checkpoints in the workflow

fields.name: QC checkpoint name
fields.after_uo: UO after which this QC is performed

extraction_guidelines: Extract ALL unit operations mentioned, even if they seem minor
For each UO, fill as many of the 7 components as the paper provides
Mark is_new=true for UOs not found in uo_catalog.json
Include confidence scores based on how explicitly the information is stated
Note the source_section (METHODS, RESULTS, etc.) for traceability
Look for workflow variants: different combinations of UOs for the same workflow
Extract upstream workflows (steps performed before the target workflow) if described in the paper, e.g. strain construction, media preparation, sample preprocessing, transformation
Extract downstream workflows (steps performed after the target workflow) if described in the paper, e.g. purification, analytics, quality verification, scale-up
Include all identified upstream/downstream workflows in the workflows array with appropriate confidence scores reflecting how extensively the paper describes them
Record inter-workflow connections in uo_connections to capture the sequential or data-flow relationships between upstream, target, and downstream workflows
